description: A darkened, color-muted reproduction of a classical painting of the crucifixion, with the central figure on a cross and several figures gathered below. Centered white text over a small cross symbol reads 'FATHER INTO THY HANDS I COMMEND MY SPIRIT' with a smaller line below reading 'Luke 23:46'.
notable_text: FATHER INTO THY HANDS I COMMEND MY SPIRIT; Luke 23:46
